body.purpose: Default reading text and UI copy (>=14px).

shadows.name: ambient-glass
shadows.purpose: Default soft card lift over Mint Paper.

shadows.name: emerald-glow
shadows.purpose: State-only emphasis (live session, focus). Animated 5px->20px. Never ambient.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action: translucent emerald pill with soft action-lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:48px; padding:0 24px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius:9999px; background:rgba(5,150,105,0.8); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); color:#fff; font-weight:500; box-shadow:0 10px 15px -3px rgba(5,150,105,0.2); transition:all .3s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:rgba(5,150,105,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #059669; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:scale(0.95); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis action: emerald outline pill on transparent.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:48px; padding:0 24px; border:2px solid rgba(5,150,105,0.5); border-radius:9999px; background:transparent; color:#059669; font-weight:500; transition:all .3s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:rgba(5,150,105,0.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #059669; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: The default surface: frosted translucent white over Mint Paper with soft ambient lift.
components.html:
Last session

Lower back · 2 weeks ago
components.css: .ds-card-glass { padding:16px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); border-radius:16px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.7) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 100%); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); box-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card-title { margin:0 0 4px; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:700; color:#18181b; } .ds-card-body { margin:0; font-size:0.875rem; color:#71717a; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Calm field with a clear keyboard-visible emerald focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search for a clinic" />
components.css: .ds-input { height:44px; width:100%; padding:0 12px; border:1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius:12px; background:transparent; color:#18181b; font-size:0.875rem; transition:box-shadow .2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#71717a; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #059669; }

components.name: Bottom Nav Item
components.description: Signature app-shell chrome: thumb-reachable bottom tab, emerald when active.
components.css: .ds-bottomnav { display:flex; gap:8px; padding:8px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .ds-navitem { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:2px; flex:1; padding:6px 0; border:none; background:none; color:#71717a; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; } .ds-navitem--active { color:#059669; }

narrative.overview: ChiroCard should feel like a well-kept personal health record that happens to be beautiful — quiet, legible, and unmistakably yours. The system is built on a single calm color story (emerald on a soft mint paper) and a frosted-glass surface language that keeps the interface feeling light and unintimidating. Depth comes from translucency and soft diffusion, not heavy chrome. The personality is calm, trustworthy, clinical-grade: the confidence of a medical record without the coldness of one. It explicitly rejects the cold, dense clinical EHR, and keeps frosted glass and glow as seasoning, never the meal — calm over clever.
keyCharacteristics: One calm color story: emerald accents on emerald-tinted mint paper.
Frosted-glass surfaces (translucent white, soft blur) instead of hard cards.
Pill-shaped, soft, tactile controls; generous radii throughout.
Soft, diffuse depth (ambient shadow + subtle glow), never hard drop shadows.
Inter everywhere — one humanist sans, sized for easy reading by older users.

rules.name: The One Hue Rule
rules.body: Emerald is the only brand color. No blue/purple/multi-color accent systems. Red appears only for destructive or error states, never decoratively.

rules.name: The Readable-First Rule
rules.body: Body text never drops below 14px; weight (400/500/700), not color or font-swaps, carries hierarchy.

rules.name: The Soft-Diffusion Rule
rules.body: Shadows are broad, low-opacity, blurred — never tight or dark. Glow is a response to state, not resting decoration.

dos: Do rest everything on Mint Paper (#ecfdf5), not stark white — the emerald tint keeps the product calm instead of clinical.
Do keep emerald the single brand hue; express hierarchy with weight and translucency, not new colors.
Do use frosted glass + soft ambient shadow for depth; keep blurs soft and shadows low-opacity.
Do keep body text >=14px and provide visible 2px emerald focus rings for keyboard users (WCAG 2.2 AA).
Do reserve Alert Red for destructive/error states only — its rarity is the point.
donts: Don't look like a cold, dense clinical EHR (Epic / MyChart): no cramped gray data tables, jargon-dense forms, dropdown mazes, or institutional coldness.
Don't let frosted glass and emerald glow tip into hype or decoration — calm over clever. If a glow isn't communicating live state, remove it.
Don't introduce a second accent hue, multi-color category tags, or purple/blue gradients.
Don't use hard, dark, small-blur drop shadows; if it looks like a 2014 app card, the shadow is wrong.
Don't convey status by color alone — pair with text or icon for color-blind users.
